George and John

Blindfold Art Battle!

Watch the ultimate artistic showdown in 'Blindfold Art Battle!' Join Georgie and John as they take on the challenge of creating nature and underwater drawings while blindfolded. Who will capture the beauty of the natural world without their sight? Tune in to find out, and prepare for a hilarious and creative competition that's bound to keep you entertained!

Watch on YouTube

Summary

About this video

Watch the ultimate artistic showdown in 'Blindfold Art Battle!' Join Georgie and John as they take on the challenge of creating nature and underwater drawings while blindfolded. Who will capture the beauty of the natural world without their sight? Tune in to find out, and prepare for a hilarious and creative competition that's bound to keep you entertained!
